message:
fix: Improve URL encoding/decoding and shell command execution

URL encoding/decoding (RFC 3986 compliant):
- hook.rs: Proper percent-encoding for all non-unreserved characters
- api.rs: Full %XX hex sequence decoding with + as space support
- Add tests for URL decoding edge cases

Shell execution fix (executor.rs):
- Use sh -c for command execution instead of whitespace splitting
- Properly handles quoted arguments and shell features
- Matches SSH client behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
